mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_progress (user_id, vuln_module, completed, completed_at, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{vulnModule}, #{completed}, #{completedAt}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE completed = #{completed}, completed_at = #{completedAt}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM learning_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND vuln_module = #{vulnModule}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learning_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND completed = 1
mapper.update: INSERT INTO learning_progress (user_id, vuln_module, completed, completed_at, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{vulnModule}, 1, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE completed = 1, completed_at = NOW()
